docs.name: Drawer Slide
docs.description: Slide-out drawer panel with drag-to-dismiss, spring physics, and backdrop blur. Portals above page chrome by default.

props.name: isOpen
props.description: React state abstraction determining visible rendering.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Method triggered when dismiss actions evaluation (drag, backdrop, external limit).

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the active sliding sheet.

props.name: position
props.description: Anchoring enumeration bounding left, right, top, or bottom screen edges.

props.name: className
props.description: Specific styling modifiers passing onto the physical sliding panel.

props.name: overlayClassName
props.description: Specific styling modifiers passing onto the dimming backdrop.

props.name: width
props.description: CSS explicit translation sizing left/right sliding panels.

props.name: height
props.description: CSS explicit translation sizing top/bottom sliding panels.

props.name: dragToClose
props.description: Map touch swiping events onto gesture recognizers supporting drag dismiss.

props.name: usePortal
props.description: When true (default), portals overlay and panel to document.body with z-index above sticky headers.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible label applied to the drawer's dialog region.

docs.overview: DrawerSlide animates a panel in from any screen edge (left, right, top, bottom) over a blurred overlay. Supports drag-to-close, keyboard Escape dismissal, and aria-modal focus trapping.

scenarios.title: Navigation sidebar
scenarios.description: Open a left-edge drawer for primary navigation on mobile layouts.

scenarios.title: Bottom sheet for mobile actions
scenarios.description: Use a bottom-edge drawer as a mobile action sheet instead of a modal dialog.
